2026-05-16 11:33:15.401 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (24ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`DisplayOrder`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`
FROM `products` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `categories` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `t`.`CategoryId`
LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `p`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `p`.`ProductId`, `t`.`CategoryId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`DisplayOrder`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`
FROM `products` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `categories` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `t`.`CategoryId`
LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `p`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `p`.`ProductId`, `t`.`CategoryId`

2026-05-16 11:52:06.439 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (15ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`DisplayOrder`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`
FROM `products` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `categories` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `t`.`CategoryId`
LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `p`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `p`.`ProductId`, `t`.`CategoryId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`DisplayOrder`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`
FROM `products` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `categories` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `t`.`CategoryId`
LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `p`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `p`.`ProductId`, `t`.`CategoryId`

2026-05-16 14:02:30.362 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (16ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`DisplayOrder`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`
FROM `products` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `categories` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `t`.`CategoryId`
LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `p`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `p`.`ProductId`, `t`.`CategoryId`

2026-05-16 14:06:35.847 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (15ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`DisplayOrder`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`
FROM `products` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `categories` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `t`.`CategoryId`
LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `p`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `p`.`ProductId`, `t`.`CategoryId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`DisplayOrder`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`
FROM `products` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `categories` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `t`.`CategoryId`
LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `p`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `p`.`ProductId`, `t`.`CategoryId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`DisplayOrder`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`
FROM `products` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `categories` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `t`.`CategoryId`
LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `p`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `p`.`ProductId`, `t`.`CategoryId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`DisplayOrder`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`
FROM `products` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`

ORDER BY `p`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `p`.`ProductId`, `t`.`CategoryId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`DisplayOrder`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`
FROM `products` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `categories` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `t`.`CategoryId`
LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `p`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `p`.`ProductId`, `t`.`CategoryId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
2026-05-16 14:58:48.239 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (8ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']

FROM `orders` AS `o`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`CreatedBy`, `u`.`DeletedAt`, `u`.`DeletedBy`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`GPA`, `u`.`IsDeleted`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`Phone`, `u`.`Role`, `u`.`StudentExpiresAt`, `u`.`StudentStatus`, `u`.`StudentVerifiedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedBy`

) AS `t` ON `o`.`UserId` = `t`.`UserId`

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `t`.`UserId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Email`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GPA`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`Password`, `t`.`Phone`, `t`.`Role`, `t`.`StudentExpiresAt`, `t`.`StudentStatus`, `t`.`StudentVerifiedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`
FROM `orders` AS `o`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`CreatedBy`, `u`.`DeletedAt`, `u`.`DeletedBy`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`GPA`, `u`.`IsDeleted`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`Phone`, `u`.`Role`, `u`.`StudentExpiresAt`, `u`.`StudentStatus`, `u`.`StudentVerifiedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `users` AS `u`
    WHERE NOT (`u`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `o`.`UserId` = `t`.`UserId`
ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`

    FROM `cart` AS `c`
    WHERE `c`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (

        SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

FROM `orders` AS `o`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`CreatedBy`, `u`.`DeletedAt`, `u`.`DeletedBy`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`GPA`, `u`.`IsDeleted`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`Phone`, `u`.`Role`, `u`.`StudentExpiresAt`, `u`.`StudentStatus`, `u`.`StudentVerifiedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `users` AS `u`
    WHERE NOT (`u`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `o`.`UserId` = `t`.`UserId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `t`.`UserId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Email`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GPA`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`Password`, `t`.`Phone`, `t`.`Role`, `t`.`StudentExpiresAt`, `t`.`StudentStatus`, `t`.`StudentVerifiedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`
FROM `orders` AS `o`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`CreatedBy`, `u`.`DeletedAt`, `u`.`DeletedBy`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`GPA`, `u`.`IsDeleted`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`Phone`, `u`.`Role`, `u`.`StudentExpiresAt`, `u`.`StudentStatus`, `u`.`StudentVerifiedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `users` AS `u`
    WHERE NOT (`u`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `o`.`UserId` = `t`.`UserId`
ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `t`.`UserId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Email`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GPA`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`Password`, `t`.`Phone`, `t`.`Role`, `t`.`StudentExpiresAt`, `t`.`StudentStatus`, `t`.`StudentVerifiedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`
FROM `orders` AS `o`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`CreatedBy`, `u`.`DeletedAt`, `u`.`DeletedBy`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`GPA`, `u`.`IsDeleted`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`Phone`, `u`.`Role`, `u`.`StudentExpiresAt`, `u`.`StudentStatus`, `u`.`StudentVerifiedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `users` AS `u`
    WHERE NOT (`u`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `o`.`UserId` = `t`.`UserId`
ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC

2026-05-16 15:02:31.221 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (

FROM `products` AS `p`

SELECT `t`.`OrderId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`OrderNumber`, `t`.`ShippingCost`, `t`.`Status`, `t`.`TotalAmount`, `t`.`UserId`, `t`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`PaymentId`, `t0`.`OrderItemId`, `t0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `t0`.`DiscountAmount`, `t0`.`FinalPrice`, `t0`.`OrderId`, `t0`.`OriginalPrice`, `t0`.`ProductId`, `t0`.`Quantity`, `t0`.`ProductId0`, `t0`.`CategoryId`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`CreatedBy`, `t0`.`DeletedAt`, `t0`.`DeletedBy`, `t0`.`Description`, `t0`.`DescriptionEn`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`NameEn`, `t0`.`Price`, `t0`.`Stock`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`UpdatedBy`, `t0`.`Weight`, `t`.`City`, `t`.`CityRef`, `t`.`OrderId0`, `t`.`RecipientName`, `t`.`RecipientPhone`, `t`.`TrackingNumber`, `t`.`WarehouseNumber`, `t`.`WarehouseRef`, `t`.`Amount`, `t`.`CreatedAt0`, `t`.`IdempotencyKey`, `t`.`Method`, `t`.`OrderId1`, `t`.`Status0`, `t`.`StripePaymentIntentId`, `t`.`StripeSessionId`, `t`.`TransactionId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`
FROM (
    SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`CityRef`, `s`.`OrderId` AS `OrderId0`, `s`.`RecipientName`, `s`.`RecipientPhone`, `s`.`TrackingNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseRef`, `p`.`PaymentId`, `p`.`Amount`, `p`.`CreatedAt` AS `CreatedAt0`, `p`.`IdempotencyKey`, `p`.`Method`, `p`.`OrderId` AS `OrderId1`, `p`.`Status` AS `Status0`, `p`.`StripePaymentIntentId`, `p`.`StripeSessionId`, `p`.`TransactionId`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`
    FROM `orders` AS `o`
    LEFT JOIN `shipping` AS `s` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `s`.`OrderId`
    LEFT JOIN `payments` AS `p` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `p`.`OrderId`
    WHERE `o`.`OrderId` = @__id_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `o0`.`OrderItemId`, `o0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `o0`.`DiscountAmount`, `o0`.`FinalPrice`, `o0`.`OrderId`, `o0`.`OriginalPrice`, `o0`.`ProductId`, `o0`.`Quantity`, `t1`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `t1`.`CategoryId`, `t1`.`CreatedAt`, `t1`.`CreatedBy`, `t1`.`DeletedAt`, `t1`.`DeletedBy`, `t1`.`Description`, `t1`.`DescriptionEn`, `t1`.`IsDeleted`, `t1`.`Name`, `t1`.`NameEn`, `t1`.`Price`, `t1`.`Stock`, `t1`.`UpdatedAt`, `t1`.`UpdatedBy`, `t1`.`Weight`
    FROM `orderitems` AS `o0`
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT `p0`.`ProductId`, `p0`.`CategoryId`, `p0`.`CreatedAt`, `p0`.`CreatedBy`, `p0`.`DeletedAt`, `p0`.`DeletedBy`, `p0`.`Description`, `p0`.`DescriptionEn`, `p0`.`IsDeleted`, `p0`.`Name`, `p0`.`NameEn`, `p0`.`Price`, `p0`.`Stock`, `p0`.`UpdatedAt`, `p0`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`Weight`
        FROM `products` AS `p0`
        WHERE NOT (`p0`.`IsDeleted`)
    ) AS `t1` ON `o0`.`ProductId` = `t1`.`ProductId`
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`OrderId` = `t0`.`OrderId`
ORDER BY `t`.`OrderId`, `t`.`ShippingId`, `t`.`PaymentId`, `t0`.`OrderItemId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `t`.`UserId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Email`, `t`.`FirstName`, `t`.`GPA`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`LastName`, `t`.`Password`, `t`.`Phone`, `t`.`Role`, `t`.`StudentExpiresAt`, `t`.`StudentStatus`, `t`.`StudentVerifiedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`
FROM `orders` AS `o`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`CreatedAt`, `u`.`CreatedBy`, `u`.`DeletedAt`, `u`.`DeletedBy`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`GPA`, `u`.`IsDeleted`, `u`.`LastName`, `u`.`Password`, `u`.`Phone`, `u`.`Role`, `u`.`StudentExpiresAt`, `u`.`StudentStatus`, `u`.`StudentVerifiedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedAt`, `u`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `users` AS `u`
    WHERE NOT (`u`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `o`.`UserId` = `t`.`UserId`
ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t0`.`OrderItemId`, `t0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `t0`.`DiscountAmount`, `t0`.`FinalPrice`, `t0`.`OrderId`, `t0`.`OriginalPrice`, `t0`.`ProductId`, `t0`.`Quantity`, `t0`.`ProductId0`, `t0`.`CategoryId`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`CreatedBy`, `t0`.`DeletedAt`, `t0`.`DeletedBy`, `t0`.`Description`, `t0`.`DescriptionEn`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`NameEn`, `t0`.`Price`, `t0`.`Stock`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`UpdatedBy`, `t0`.`Weight`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`CityRef`, `s`.`OrderId`, `s`.`RecipientName`, `s`.`RecipientPhone`, `s`.`TrackingNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseRef`
FROM `orders` AS `o`
LEFT JOIN `shipping` AS `s` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `s`.`OrderId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `o0`.`OrderItemId`, `o0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `o0`.`DiscountAmount`, `o0`.`FinalPrice`, `o0`.`OrderId`, `o0`.`OriginalPrice`, `o0`.`ProductId`, `o0`.`Quantity`, `t`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`Price`, `t`.`Stock`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `t`.`Weight`
    FROM `orderitems` AS `o0`
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`
        FROM `products` AS `p`
        WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
    ) AS `t` ON `o0`.`ProductId` = `t`.`ProductId`
) AS `t0` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `t0`.`OrderId`
WHERE `o`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `o`.`OrderId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t0`.`OrderItemId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`DisplayOrder`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`ParentCategoryId`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `p0`.`ImageId`, `p0`.`DisplayOrder`, `p0`.`ImageURL`, `p0`.`IsPrimary`, `p0`.`ProductId`
FROM `products` AS `p`
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT `c`.`CategoryId`, `c`.`CreatedAt`, `c`.`CreatedBy`, `c`.`DeletedAt`, `c`.`DeletedBy`, `c`.`Description`, `c`.`DescriptionEn`, `c`.`DisplayOrder`, `c`.`IsDeleted`, `c`.`Name`, `c`.`NameEn`, `c`.`ParentCategoryId`, `c`.`UpdatedAt`, `c`.`UpdatedBy`
    FROM `categories` AS `c`
    WHERE NOT (`c`.`IsDeleted`)
) AS `t` ON `p`.`CategoryId` = `t`.`CategoryId`
LEFT JOIN `productimages` AS `p0` ON `p`.`ProductId` = `p0`.`ProductId`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
ORDER BY `p`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `p`.`ProductId`, `t`.`CategoryId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

FROM (
    SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`
    FROM `orders` AS `o`

    LIMIT @__p_1 OFFSET @__p_0
) AS `t`

    SELECT `u`.`UserId`, `u`.`Email`, `u`.`FirstName`, `u`.`LastName`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `o`.`OrderId`, `o`.`CreatedAt`, `o`.`OrderNumber`, `o`.`ShippingCost`, `o`.`Status`, `o`.`TotalAmount`, `o`.`UserId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t0`.`OrderItemId`, `t0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `t0`.`DiscountAmount`, `t0`.`FinalPrice`, `t0`.`OrderId`, `t0`.`OriginalPrice`, `t0`.`ProductId`, `t0`.`Quantity`, `t0`.`ProductId0`, `t0`.`CategoryId`, `t0`.`CreatedAt`, `t0`.`CreatedBy`, `t0`.`DeletedAt`, `t0`.`DeletedBy`, `t0`.`Description`, `t0`.`DescriptionEn`, `t0`.`IsDeleted`, `t0`.`Name`, `t0`.`NameEn`, `t0`.`Price`, `t0`.`Stock`, `t0`.`UpdatedAt`, `t0`.`UpdatedBy`, `t0`.`Weight`, `s`.`City`, `s`.`CityRef`, `s`.`OrderId`, `s`.`RecipientName`, `s`.`RecipientPhone`, `s`.`TrackingNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseNumber`, `s`.`WarehouseRef`
FROM `orders` AS `o`
LEFT JOIN `shipping` AS `s` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `s`.`OrderId`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `o0`.`OrderItemId`, `o0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `o0`.`DiscountAmount`, `o0`.`FinalPrice`, `o0`.`OrderId`, `o0`.`OriginalPrice`, `o0`.`ProductId`, `o0`.`Quantity`, `t`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`Price`, `t`.`Stock`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `t`.`Weight`
    FROM `orderitems` AS `o0`
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT `p`.`ProductId`, `p`.`CategoryId`, `p`.`CreatedAt`, `p`.`CreatedBy`, `p`.`DeletedAt`, `p`.`DeletedBy`, `p`.`Description`, `p`.`DescriptionEn`, `p`.`IsDeleted`, `p`.`Name`, `p`.`NameEn`, `p`.`Price`, `p`.`Stock`, `p`.`UpdatedAt`, `p`.`UpdatedBy`, `p`.`Weight`
        FROM `products` AS `p`
        WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
    ) AS `t` ON `o0`.`ProductId` = `t`.`ProductId`
) AS `t0` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `t0`.`OrderId`
WHERE `o`.`UserId` = @__userId_0
ORDER BY `o`.`CreatedAt` DESC, `o`.`OrderId`, `s`.`ShippingId`, `t0`.`OrderItemId`

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `o0`.`OrderItemId`, `o0`.`AppliedPromotionId`, `o0`.`DiscountAmount`, `o0`.`FinalPrice`, `o0`.`OrderId`, `o0`.`OriginalPrice`, `o0`.`ProductId`, `o0`.`Quantity`, `t`.`ProductId` AS `ProductId0`, `t`.`CategoryId`, `t`.`CreatedAt`, `t`.`CreatedBy`, `t`.`DeletedAt`, `t`.`DeletedBy`, `t`.`Description`, `t`.`DescriptionEn`, `t`.`IsDeleted`, `t`.`Name`, `t`.`NameEn`, `t`.`Price`, `t`.`Stock`, `t`.`UpdatedAt`, `t`.`UpdatedBy`, `t`.`Weight`

) AS `t0` ON `o`.`OrderId` = `t0`.`OrderId`

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)

SELECT `p`.`ProductId` AS `productId`, `p`.`Name` AS `name`, `p`.`Stock` AS `currentStock`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`i`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `incomingdocuments` AS `i`
    WHERE NOT (`i`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`i`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalIncoming`, (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(`o`.`Quantity`), 0)
    FROM `outgoingdocuments` AS `o`
    WHERE NOT (`o`.`IsDeleted`) AND (`o`.`ProductId` = `p`.`ProductId`)) AS `totalOutgoing`
FROM `products` AS `p`
WHERE NOT (`p`.`IsDeleted`)
